what_it_does: Defines a React canvas component `Imagery` (window.Imagery) that hosts the imagery subsystem across four lanes/tabs: System library, Projects, 360° Hubs, and AI Studio. It reads/writes all imagery through window.cvImageStore (persistence) and reads generation status from window.cvOpenAI. SystemLane and ProjectsLane handle upload (file picker + drag-drop), tagging, removal, and cross-scope promotion; HubsLane manages equirectangular panoramas with a Pano360 viewer and editable hotspots plus a hub-URL preview; AI Studio is delegated to an external window.AIStudio component. An ImageEditor modal handles per-image editing/save.
observations: Header comment states every action routes through cvImageStore and cvOpenAI, and that imagery can be promoted across scopes.
TABS array defines the four lanes with id/label/icon/sub; SYSTEM_TAGS and PROJECT_TAGS are hardcoded tag vocabularies.
Subscribes to both cvImageStore and cvOpenAI changes via useEffect to force re-render / track openAIReady.
SystemLane offers `seedStarter()` which adds a fixed list of ../assets/illustrations references with tags.
ProjectsLane uses window.prompt() to create projects (name + optional client) and scopes uploads per project id.
HubsLane edits hotspots (add via prompt label at a lon/lat, remove), renames panos, and shows a conceptv.io/panotours/<company>/<project>/<pano> URL preview.
AI Studio is documented as implemented in canvases/AIStudio.jsx and referenced as <AIStudio/> (a file-local dependency on window.AIStudio).
Shared components: ImageCard (with edit/promote/remove overlay and an AI tag), EmptyStateImagery, plus inline Octagon and Diamond SVGs.
Pano viewer height fixed at 460; ImageCard shows w×h dims and tags.
cvOpenAI exposes isConfigured(), getSettings().imageModel, and a subscribe().
standouts: Cross-scope promotion model: an AI generation or project image can be promoted into the System library; project images stay scoped.
Editable 360° hub panoramas with hotspot placement and a live hub-URL preview.
Single canvas unifying four distinct imagery scopes (system/project/hub/AI) over one store.
conventions: Routes all persistence through cvImageStore and all generation/status through cvOpenAI rather than local state.
Uses CvIcon name tokens and CSS vars for styling.
Aliases React hooks with an `_im` suffix for the shared bundle.
concerns: Repeated use of blocking window.prompt() for project, pano, and hotspot naming.
Upload error handling swallows failures with empty/toast-only catches (e.g. seedStarter's catch {}).
Depends on several externally-defined globals (cvImageStore, cvOpenAI, AIStudio, Pano360, ImageEditor, KitPreviews-like) whose contracts are not visible in this file.
notes: The imagery subsystem canvas: four lanes (system/project/360 hubs/AI) over one cvImageStore, with upload, tagging, cross-scope promotion, pano hotspot editing, and a delegated AI Studio.
questions: What is the shape of cvImageStore (list/add/update/remove/counts/listProjects) and how does it persist?
What does the external window.AIStudio (canvases/AIStudio.jsx) render and how does it use cvOpenAI?
How is the Pano360 hotspot lon/lat coordinate space defined?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches. The header describes a four-lane imagery subsystem routed through cvImageStore/cvOpenAI with cross-scope promotion, and the component implements exactly those lanes and flows.
apparent_themes: Promotion of assets across brand/project/system scopes
intention_signals: Trying to centralize all imagery — brand library, per-project assets, 360 panoramas, and AI generations — into one canvas where assets flow between scopes and panos can be authored with hotspots, all backed by a single persistence store.
novelty: A unified imagery canvas combining scoped libraries, cross-scope promotion, and an editable equirectangular pano/hotspot authoring lane.
contribution: Contributes the Imagery canvas: system/project/hub/AI lanes over cvImageStore, upload + tagging + cross-scope promotion, 360 pano hotspot editing with URL preview, and a delegated AI Studio mount.
summary_for_embedding: A React canvas (window.Imagery) with four lanes (system library, projects, 360 hubs, AI studio) over cvImageStore/cvOpenAI, supporting upload, tagging, cross-scope promotion, and pano hotspot editing.
intention_for_embedding: To centralize brand, project, 360, and AI-generated imagery in one store-backed canvas where assets promote across scopes and panoramas are authored with hotspots.
